dep_airports = Counter\(f.get\('originIata','?'\) for f in flights if f['type']=='departure'\)

print\('Departures by airport:', dict\(dep_airports\)\)

Bash(cd /home/cmills/Documents/cursor/project_jamaica/server && node -e "
const db = require\('./db/connection'\);
db.exec\(\\`
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS flights \(
    id              INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    flight_number   TEXT NOT NULL,
    airport         TEXT NOT NULL,
    status          TEXT NOT NULL,
    direction       TEXT NOT NULL CHECK\(direction IN \('arrival', 'departure'\)\),
    airline         TEXT,
    aircraft        TEXT,
    aircraft_reg    TEXT,
    route           TEXT,
    route_iata      TEXT,
    route_country   TEXT,
    scheduled_time  TEXT,
    callsign        TEXT,
    fetched_at      TEXT DEFAULT \(datetime\('now'\)\)
\);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_flights_airport ON flights\(airport\);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_flights_direction ON flights\(direction\);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_flights_fetched ON flights\(fetched_at\);
\\`\);
console.log\('Flights table created'\);
")

import sys, json

    print\(f.get\('type'\), f.get\('destIata'\), f.get\('originIata'\), f.get\('flightNumber'\)\)

kin_dep = [f for f in d['flights'] if f['type']=='departure' and f.get\('originIata'\)=='KIN']
mbj_arr = [f for f in d['flights'] if f['type']=='arrival' and f.get\('destIata'\)=='MBJ']
mbj_dep = [f for f in d['flights'] if f['type']=='departure' and f.get\('originIata'\)=='MBJ']
print\(f'KIN arrivals: {len\(kin_arr\)}, departures: {len\(kin_dep\)}'\)

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/flights | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
# Check a KIN departure
for f in d['flights']:
    if f['type']=='departure' and f.get\('originIata'\)=='KIN':
        print\('KIN dep found:', f.get\('flightNumber'\), 'originIata:', f.get\('originIata'\)\)
        break
# Check a KIN arrival  
for f in d['flights']:
    if f['type']=='arrival' and f.get\('destIata'\)=='KIN':
        print\('KIN arr found:', f.get\('flightNumber'\), 'destIata:', f.get\('destIata'\)\)
        break
# Show all unique destIata and originIata values
dests = set\(f.get\('destIata'\) for f in d['flights'] if f['type']=='arrival'\)
origins = set\(f.get\('originIata'\) for f in d['flights'] if f['type']=='departure'\)
print\('Arrival destIata values:', dests\)
print\('Departure originIata values:', origins\)
")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/flights | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'Source: {d[\\"source\\"]}, Total flights: {len\(d[\\"flights\\"]\)}'\)
from collections import Counter
by_airport = Counter\(\)
for f in d['flights']:
    iata = f.get\('destIata'\) or f.get\('originIata'\) or '?'
    by_airport[iata] += 1
print\('By airport:', dict\(by_airport\)\)
")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/flights | python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\(f'Source: {d[\\"source\\"]}, Total: {len\(d[\\"flights\\"]\)}'\)
from collections import Counter
c = Counter\(\)
for f in d['flights']:
    iata = f.get\('destIata'\) or f.get\('originIata'\) or '?'
    c[iata] += 1
print\('By airport:', dict\(c\)\)
# Show the small airport flights
for f in d['flights']:
    iata = f.get\('destIata'\) or f.get\('originIata'\) or ''
    if iata in \('OCJ', 'KTP'\):
        print\(f'  {f[\\"flightNumber\\"]:10s} {f[\\"type\\"]:10s} {iata} alt={f.get\(\\"altitude\\",0\):.0f}m aircraft={f.get\(\\"aircraft\\",\\"\\"\)} reg={f.get\(\\"aircraftReg\\",\\"\\"\)}'\)
")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:3001/api/flights | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
live = [f for f in d['flights'] if f.get\('dataSource'\) == 'live']
print\(f'Live flights: {len\(live\)}'\)
for f in live:
    print\(f'  {f.get\(\\"callsign\\",\\"?\\"\)} | lat={f.get\(\\"lat\\"\)} lon={f.get\(\\"lon\\"\)} | heading={f.get\(\\"heading\\"\)} | type={f.get\(\\"type\\"\)} | destIata={f.get\(\\"destIata\\",\\"\\"\)} | status={f.get\(\\"status\\",\\"\\"\)}'\)

")
